# test sessions

Generated mechanically from the benchmark workspace.

For each benchmark test folder, the builder copies root files, excludes support and
admin-only directories such as `1.analytics/`, `2.plots/`, and
`3.extraction/`, and flattens `4.test-sessions/` so the raw session folders live
directly at each destination test root.
